notes: Production evidence for v0.3.5 — SLICE-60: Setup, Bootstrap, and Deployment Packaging. All RC gates carried forward from v0.3.5-rc.1 (541cac5). Two deployment blockers fixed (setup.html build copy, Docker Hub conditional login). Rotation rehearsal config check passed. GHCR package visibility is required to be set to public before docker-compose.prod.yml smoke can use pre-built images (manual step). Production promotion is conditional on completion of the GHCR visibility step and live rotation rehearsal.

slice_60_evidence.setup_module: Integration tests pass. Sentinel present/absent, /setup locked after bootstrap, headless bootstrap idempotency, admin email allowlist enforcement — all verified in CI run 26932617059.
slice_60_evidence.helm_lint: helm lint passes (1 chart linted, 0 failed). helm template renders 8 resource kinds. Both verified on enlogy@10.0.0.32 at commit 541cac5.
slice_60_evidence.docker_compose_prod_smoke: docker-compose.prod.yml started successfully on enlogy@10.0.0.32 with locally-built image at 541cac5. /health 200, wizard path /setup 200 with full HTML, headless path auto-bootstrapped and locked /setup to 404. GHCR pull requires package visibility to be set to public (manual operator step).
slice_60_evidence.install_sh: install.sh reviewed. Generates secrets via openssl rand -hex 32, writes .env.production, prints next-steps. Does not auto-start containers.
slice_60_evidence.env_template: .env.production.example present with all required variables. SETUP_ADMIN_EMAIL / SETUP_ADMIN_PASSWORD marked 'remove after first boot'.
slice_60_evidence.docker_hub: docker-images.yml updated to gate Docker Hub login on credential availability. GHCR publishing unconditional. Docker Hub activates once DOCKERHUB_USERNAME + DOCKERHUB_TOKEN secrets are configured.

production_preflight: pnpm production:preflight --check-config passes in dev. Run on target environment before production cutover.
production_e2e: FreeSWITCH smoke run 26932864772 passed all production E2E steps on enlogy@10.0.0.32 at commit 541cac5 (rc/v0.3.5): API health, DB contracts, FreeSWITCH ESL profile, runtime directory/dialplan lookup, IVR lifecycle, SIP REGISTER, Go agent ESL, FreeSWITCH hardening (0 findings), SIP TLS/SRTP/NAT smoke, and observability query. Artifact: freeswitch-smoke-26932864772.
production_soak: RC-topology soak evidence inherited from v0.3.0 (smoke run 26903877370, 2026-06-03). v0.3.5 adds no changes to the call path, rate limiting, or SLO-affecting hot paths. SLICE-60 changes are setup-time only.
production_slo: SLO evidence from v0.3.0 (docs/ops/runtime-slo-evidence-2026-06-03.json): /health/ready p99 8ms, /api/v1/freeswitch/directory p99 15ms, /api/v1/freeswitch/dialplan p99 22ms. No hot-path changes in v0.3.5.
restore_smoke: Restore evidence inherited from v0.3.0 (docs/ops/restore-evidence-enlogy-2026-06-02.json). Migration 0052_system_config.sql adds one table; restore path unaffected.
rate_limit_topology: Rate limiting unchanged from v0.3.0. Setup wizard has separate in-process limiter (5 req/min/IP).
carrier_interop: Inherited from v0.3.0 (docs/ops/carrier-interop-evidence-fusionpbx-2026-06-02.json). No carrier or call-path changes in v0.3.5.
log_redaction: Log redaction evidence from smoke run 26932864772 on enlogy@10.0.0.32 at 541cac5. Artifact: freeswitch-smoke-26932864772.
rotation_rehearsal: Configuration check passed: pnpm rotation:rehearsal --check-config exits 0 on enlogy@10.0.0.32 at commit 92add97. Live rotation rehearsal (deploy secondary token, verify overlap window, promote secondary to primary, verify old primary rejected) is a required gate before serving live calls on a new deployment.
network_config: Production network config evidence from smoke run 26932864772. Artifact: freeswitch-smoke-26932864772.
security_review: CodeQL run 26932617073 clean. FreeSWITCH hardening 0 findings (smoke run 26932864772). Log redaction: 0 scan findings. Prior CodeQL exclusions for RFC 3261 MD5 and CI self-signed TLS remain in effect.

operator_signoff.name: Fatih Kucukpetek
operator_signoff.notes: Production signoff for v0.3.5. SLICE-60 delivered. All CI/smoke gates pass. docker-compose.prod.yml smoke passed with locally-built image. GHCR packages must be made public and live rotation rehearsal must be performed before activating this release on a production deployment that serves live calls.

remaining_operator_steps: Make GHCR packages public: GitHub → Profile → Packages → Change visibility to Public for each managecallai-* package
Run live rotation rehearsal: pnpm rotation:rehearsal (deploy secondary token, verify overlap, promote, verify rejection)
Configure DOCKERHUB_USERNAME + DOCKERHUB_TOKEN repo secrets to enable Docker Hub publishing
